recommendations.title: Sweet Family
recommendations.overview: A fat woman attempts to lose weight in order to use her mother's wedding dress with the help of  her evil sisters and needy fiancé.

recommendations.title: Dude, Where's My Car?
recommendations.overview: Two stoners wake up after a night of partying and cannot remember where they parked their car.

recommendations.title: 200 Cigarettes
recommendations.overview: In 1981 New York City, a collection of twentysomethings try to cope with relationships, loneliness, desire and their individual neuroses on New Years Eve.

recommendations.title: I'm Rich!
recommendations.overview: Selminha is a lower-class woman who receives a family inheritance, but only if she meets the challenge of spending 30 million reais in 30 days, without accumulating anything. However, in this marathon, she will find out that there are things that mon

recommendations.title: Ghostbusters
recommendations.overview: After losing their university jobs, three parapsychologists start a ghost-catching business in New York City and uncover a supernatural threat that could destroy the world.

recommendations.title: White Girl
recommendations.overview: Summer, New York City. A college girl falls hard for a guy she just met. After a night of partying goes wrong, she goes to wild extremes to get him back.

recommendations.title: Run Fatboy Run
recommendations.overview: Five years after jilting his pregnant fiancée on their wedding day, out-of-shape Dennis decides to run a marathon to win her back.

recommendations.title: Tyson's Run
recommendations.overview: When fifteen-year-old Tyson attends public school for the first time, his life is changed forever. While helping his father clean up after the football team, Tyson befriends champion marathon runner Aklilu. Never letting his autism hold him back, Tys

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Ordinary People
recommendations.overview: A gym teacher and his female student look for her missing friend. But as they investigate, they find that her disappearance is a part of a larger conspiracy.
